data.text: AT LAST, ANOTHER FELYSIAN WORLD OUTSIDE THE FARHOME SYSTEM IN
THIS REGION OF SPACE! THIS ONE IS THE TENTH MOON OF THE THIRD
STAR IN THIS SYSTEM. THE SURFACE GRAVITY IS A WEAK .860 BUT THE
PRESSURE IS 1.000 FOR ALL PRACTICAL PURPOSES.
260.35: NICE ISLAND, MOUNTAIN AT EDGE OF WATER IF YOU CAN FIND
